'''magoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakayake|yakayake]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakayake|yakayake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| magoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægereth|mægereth]] || [[word:mægerej|mægerej]] || [[word:mægeresh|mægeresh]] || [[word:mægere|mægere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magogoroth|magogoroth]] || [[word:magogoroj|magogoroj]] || [[word:magogorosh|magogorosh]] || [[word:magogoro|magogoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magoroth|magoroth]] || [[word:magoroj|magoroj]] || [[word:magorosh|magorosh]] || [[word:magoro|magoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magofroth|magofroth]] || [[word:magofroj|magofroj]] || [[word:magofrosh|magofrosh]] || [[word:magofrof|magofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:magorotho|magorotho]] || [[word:magorojo|magorojo]] || [[word:magorosho|magorosho]] || [[word:magoroko|magoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:magoroth|magoroth]] || [[word:magoroj|magoroj]] || [[word:magorosh|magorosh]] || [[word:magoro|magoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:magorothol|magorothol]] || [[word:magorojol|magorojol]] || [[word:magoroshol|magoroshol]] || [[word:magorokol|magorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:magorothotho|magorothotho]] || [[word:magorojojo|magorojojo]] || [[word:magoroshosho|magoroshosho]] || [[word:magoroko|magoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:magorothon|magorothon]] || [[word:magorojon|magorojon]] || [[word:magoroshon|magoroshon]] || [[word:magorokon|magorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:magorothoro|magorothoro]] || [[word:magorojoro|magorojoro]] || [[word:magoroshoro|magoroshoro]] || [[word:magorokoro|magorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
